query:
ALTER TABLE `16_kommo_leads` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `etapa` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `etapaId` INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `responsavel` VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `valorLead` DECIMAL(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `webhookPayload` TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `convertidoOs` TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0;
